title: Bloodmoon Rebrushed
description: Adds the Bloodmoon event from Terraria to Minecraft
body:
This mod adds a lunar event called "Bloodmoon", every night there is a chance of 5% (configurable) that a bloodmoon will rise. During this event, mobs are 4x (configurable) as likely to spawn. This will only apply to monsters spawned on the surface. You can also not sleep through a bloodmoon (configurable).

On the visual side the moon, the sky and sky light will be tinted red, to accommodate for the red sky the fog will also turn black for a nicer effect.

![Blood Moon...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2cf27080fb3deb68287775cb9250f9e3ddb3962_0.webp)

[Inspired by Lumien231's Bloodmoon mod](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bloodmoon)
